productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Tony Check Blue Shirt
description: CompositionBlue and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a stand collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tabs, yoked back, seams lined on front for Fit, pocket on left chest and branding on right chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentWash and dry inside outDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron;Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt will give you a relaxed, easy-going air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
